'''wafoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podagra|podagra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podagra|podagra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wafoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæfeyeth|wæfeyeth]] || [[word:wæfeyej|wæfeyej]] || [[word:wæfeyesh|wæfeyesh]] || [[word:wæfeye|wæfeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafofoyoth|wafofoyoth]] || [[word:wafofoyoj|wafofoyoj]] || [[word:wafofoyosh|wafofoyosh]] || [[word:wafofoyo|wafofoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafoyoth|wafoyoth]] || [[word:wafoyoj|wafoyoj]] || [[word:wafoyosh|wafoyosh]] || [[word:wafoyo|wafoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafofyoth|wafofyoth]] || [[word:wafofyoj|wafofyoj]] || [[word:wafofyosh|wafofyosh]] || [[word:wafofyof|wafofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wafoyotho|wafoyotho]] || [[word:wafoyojo|wafoyojo]] || [[word:wafoyosho|wafoyosho]] || [[word:wafoyoko|wafoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wafoyoth|wafoyoth]] || [[word:wafoyoj|wafoyoj]] || [[word:wafoyosh|wafoyosh]] || [[word:wafoyo|wafoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wafoyothol|wafoyothol]] || [[word:wafoyojol|wafoyojol]] || [[word:wafoyoshol|wafoyoshol]] || [[word:wafoyokol|wafoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wafoyothotho|wafoyothotho]] || [[word:wafoyojojo|wafoyojojo]] || [[word:wafoyoshosho|wafoyoshosho]] || [[word:wafoyoko|wafoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wafoyothon|wafoyothon]] || [[word:wafoyojon|wafoyojon]] || [[word:wafoyoshon|wafoyoshon]] || [[word:wafoyokon|wafoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wafoyothoro|wafoyothoro]] || [[word:wafoyojoro|wafoyojoro]] || [[word:wafoyoshoro|wafoyoshoro]] || [[word:wafoyokoro|wafoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
